objective: Refactor scripts root into responsibility subfolders while preserving documented root commands as compatibility facades. Root facades dispatch to trackable implementation folders (android, catalog, desktop, publishing) through shared compat contracts; existing research remains its own pipeline.
completedSlices: Mapped scripts root, public root command paths, existing research pipeline, and ignored pre-existing scripts/release artifact directory.
Added scripts/tests/smoke.sh as a low-cost public behavior/syntax validation before structural edits.
Moved Android/emulator/app-run automation implementations into scripts/android with root compatibility wrappers.
Moved Linux desktop integration and screenshot automation implementations into scripts/desktop with root compatibility wrappers.
Moved catalog/shader Python maintenance implementations into scripts/catalog with root compatibility wrappers.

Copied release proof/Play Console lane implementations into trackable scripts/publishing and pointed root compatibility wrappers there because scripts/release is ignored by the repo release/ gitignore pattern.
Created shared compatibility dispatchers in scripts/compat/dispatch.sh and scripts/compat/run_python_impl.py.
Adjusted moved implementation scripts to resolve repository root from their new subfolder depth.
Extracted shared Android build-lock/cleanup helpers into scripts/android/build_lock.sh for overnight emulator and UI monkey loops.
Updated scripts/AGENTS.md with the new responsibility topology and validation command.
Validated smoke checks and completed root-file audit.
